title: monimiaceae
intro: The Monimiaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, specifically a family within the order Laurales. Monimiaceae is characterized by its evergreen trees and shrubs, often with aromatic leaves and small, usually white, flowers. This family is primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions of the world, particularly in the Pacific Islands and Australia. The Monimiaceae family comprises around 50 to 60 species, which are often used for their timber, essential oils, and medicinal properties.
